catalog_script_client.name: onChange_common

sys_update_version.name: catalog_script_client_9f3243440fabba102e576dd530d1b2bb
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>onChange_common</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
   if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
      return;
   }

    try {
        // 1. Record ProducerのSys IDと有効なCCSを取得
        var rpSysId = g_form.getUniqueValue();
        var switchManager = new CCSFlowSwitchByDT();
        var activeItems = switchManager.getActiveItems(rpSysId);

        // 2. onChange用CCSを実行
        if (activeItems.ccs_onchange_sys_id) {
            var grCCS = new GlideRecord('sys_script_client');
            if (grCCS.get(activeItems.ccs_onchange_sys_id) && grCCS.active) {
                // onChangeの引数を保持して実行
                var actualOnChange = eval('(' + grCCS.script + ')');
                actualOnChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading);
                gsftDebug.log('Record Producer onChange CCS実行成功：' + grCCS.name);
            }
        }
    } catch (e) {
        gsftDebug.error('Record Producer onChange CCS切り替えエラー：' + e.message);
    }
   
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-06 06:51:14</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>9f3243440fabba102e576dd530d1b2bb</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>onChange_common</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="test" source="x_846092_test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_9f3243440fabba102e576dd530d1b2bb</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-10 08:30:42</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>false</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
